title: Acai Bowl
allergens: Tree nuts/Peanuts; Gluten (Granola/Oats); Dairy (if yogurt); Coconut
description: Fresh, chilled açaí blend topped with crunchy granola, fresh diced fruit, chia pudding, and a generous scoop of nut butter. Finished with a snowy sprinkle of coconut. Bright, fruity, and energizing with a creamy-crunchy bite.

title: Greek Yogurt Bowl
description: Thick, creamy Greek yogurt layered with crunchy granola, vibrant berry compote, coconut flakes, and a rich nutty drizzle. Creamy-meets-crunchy with a bright, fruity tang. Fresh, filling, and perfectly balanced.
